Class LoadBalancerClientsProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.LoadBalancerProperties
org.springframework.cloud.client.loadbalancer.LoadBalancerClientsProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.cloud.loadbalancer") public class LoadBalancerClientsProperties extends LoadBalancerProperties
A ConfigurationProperties bean for Spring Cloud Loadbalancer. Individual clients are configured via the clients field. Defaults and other properties are located in the LoadBalancerProperties base class.
Since:
3.1.0
Author:
Spencer Gibb
